heading: Procedure and requirements for requesting tax return information from the Internal Revenue Service
label: 1098h Procedure and requirements for requesting tax return information from the Internal Revenue Service

children.label: I
children.text: the Secretary will have the authority to request that the Secretary of the Treasury disclose return information of such individuals to authorized persons (as defined in section 6103()(13) of title 26) for the relevant purposes described in such section; andl

children.label: II
children.text: the return information of such individuals may be redisclosed pursuant to clauses (iii), (iv), (v), and (vi) of section 6103()(13)(D) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, for the relevant purposes described in such section; andl

children.label: ii
children.text: the failure to provide such approval for the disclosures described in subclauses (I) and (II) of clause (i) will result in the Secretary being unable to calculate eligibility for such aid to such individual;

children.label: B
children.text: require, as a condition of eligibility for such aid, that such individuals affirmatively approve the disclosures described in subclauses (I) and (II) of subparagraph (A)(i); and

children.label: C
children.text: if an individual is pursuing provisional independent student status due to an unusual circumstance, as described in and provided for in , require such individual to provide an affirmative approval under subparagraph (B), but not require a parent of such individual to provide an affirmative approval under subparagraph (B).section 1087tt of this titlesection 1087uu–2 of this title

children.label: i
children.text: provide to such individuals the notification described in paragraph (1)(A)(i);

children.label: I
children.text: affirmatively approve the disclosures described in subclauses (I) and (II) of paragraph (1)(A)(i), to the extent applicable, and agree that such approval shall serve as an ongoing approval of such disclosures until the date on which the individual elects to opt out of such disclosures under or the equivalent procedures established under , as applicable; orsection 1087e(e)(8) of this titlesection 1098e(c)(2)(B) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: provide such information as the Secretary may require to confirm the eligibility of such individual for such repayment plan.

children.heading: Recertifications
children.label: B Recertifications
children.text: With respect to the first written or electronic recertification (after ) of an individual’s income or family size for purposes of an income-contingent or income-based repayment plan (entered into before ) for a loan under part D, the Secretary, with respect to such individual and any spouse of such individual, shall meet the requirements of clauses (i) and (ii) of subparagraph (A) with respect to such recertification.December 19, 2019December 19, 2019

children.label: A
children.text: provide to such individual the notification described in paragraph (1)(A)(i)(I); and

children.label: I
children.text: the date on which the individual elects to opt out of such disclosure under ; orsection 1087(a)(3)(A) of this title

children.label: II
children.text: the first day on which such loan may no longer be reinstated; or

children.label: ii
children.text: provide such information as the Secretary may require to confirm the eligibility of such individual for such discharge.

children.heading: Limit on authority
children.label: b Limit on authority
children.text: The Secretary shall only have authority to request that the Secretary of the Treasury disclose return information under section 6103()(13) of title 26 with respect to an individual if the Secretary of Education has obtained approval under subsection (a) for such disclosure.l

children.label: i
children.text: the Secretary; or

children.label: ii
children.text: in a case in which the Secretary has requested that institutions of higher education carry out the requirements of this subparagraph, an institution of higher education that has received such information; and

children.label: B
children.text: with the written consent by the applicant to an institution of higher education, may be provided by such institution of higher education as is necessary to a scholarship granting organization (including a tribal organization (defined in )), or to an organization assisting the applicant in applying for and receiving Federal, State, local, or tribal assistance, that is designated by the applicant to assist the applicant in applying for and receiving financial assistance for any component of the applicant’s cost of attendance (defined in section 1087 of this title) at that institution.section 5304 of title 25ll

children.heading: Discussion of information
children.label: 2 Discussion of information
children.text: A discussion of the information in an application described in subsection (a)(1) (including any return information disclosed under section 6103()(13) of title 26) of an applicant between an institution of higher education and the applicant may, with the written consent of the applicant, include an individual selected by the applicant (such as an advisor) to participate in such discussion.l

children.heading: Restriction on disclosing information
children.label: 3 Restriction on disclosing information
children.text: A person receiving information under paragraph (1)(B) or (2) with respect to an applicant shall not use the information for any purpose other than the express purpose for which consent was granted by the applicant and shall not disclose such information to any other person without the express permission of, or request by, the applicant.

children.heading: Student Aid Report
children.label: A Student Aid Report
children.text: The term “Student Aid Report” has the meaning given the term in section 668.2 of title 34, Code of Federal Regulations (or successor regulations).

children.label: i
children.text: indicates that the information being disclosed includes return information disclosed under section 6103()(13) of title 26 with respect to the applicant;l

children.label: ii
children.text: states the purpose for which the information is being disclosed; and

children.label: iii
children.text: states that the information may only be used for the specific purpose and no other purposes.

children.label: A
children.text: keep a record of each written consent made under this subsection for a period of at least 3 years from the date of the student’s last date of attendance at the institution; and

children.label: B
children.text: make each such record readily available for review by the Secretary.
